Token Features
🔒
Hard Supply Cap
1B max — enforced at contract level, no one can mint beyond this
🐋
Anti-Whale
Max 2% per transaction until owner renounces the limit
🔥
Burnable
Anyone can burn their own GANG tokens, reducing total supply
🌾
Farm Emissions
MasterChef role mints reward tokens only up to the supply cap
📜
Open Source
Full Solidity source available — deploy via Remix IDE
⚙️
Ownable
Standard ownership with transfer & renounce for full decentralisation
🚀 How to Deploy $GANG
1
Open Remix IDE
Go to remix.ethereum.org in your browser
2
Paste GANGToken.sol
Create a new file and paste in the full contract source code
3
Compile with Solidity 0.8.20+
Select compiler version 0.8.20 or higher and hit compile
4
Deploy to Cronos Mainnet
Select "Injected Provider — MetaMask", set network to Cronos (Chain ID 25), pass your wallet address as the constructor argument, then Deploy
5
Paste your contract address here
Copy the deployed address from MetaMask / CronoScan and replace 0x23E1D61FbA6Df8F61805059A5f52eFbb1f5613c7 in the CONTRACTS object in this app's source code
